title: Medical device shortage: 10K Hour Maintenance Kit For LTV 1150/1200 (Ventilator Accessory) - Canada.ca

## Medical device shortage: 10K Hour Maintenance Kit For LTV 1150/1200 (Ventilator Accessory)
The 10K Hour Maintenance Kit For LTV 1150/1200 (Ventilator Accessory) is currently reported as a medical device shortage through the Interim Order to help prevent or alleviate shortages in relation to COVID-19 . For a full list of shortages, refer to the medical device shortages: list of shortages .
